details: Dependency-confusion attack. Package commonweb-card@99.9.1 is a stub (module.exports = {}) with no real functionality, published at version 99.9.1. Its sole dependency "ltidisafe" points to an attacker-controlled tarball at hxxps://ltidi[.]storage[.]googleapis[.]com/depenconf/ltidisafe-3[.]5[.]2[.]tgz. When npm installs, it fetches and executes arbitrary code from the attacker's Google Cloud Storage bucket. The same campaign includes commonweb-balance@99.9.1 and commonweb-wallet@99.9.1, which use the same technique with different versions of the remote tarball (ltidisafe-3.4.5.tgz and ltidisafe-3.5.1.tgz).

cwes.name: Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere
